├─ H2: Why Choose Banners.com? └─ H4: Search ``` ## 2) AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ``` H1: Custom Poster Paper Printing ├─ H2: Poster Paper Material Options ├─ H2: Poster Paper Finishing Options ├─ H2: Production Times for Custom Poster Paper ├─ H2: Payment Options for Poster Paper Orders ├─ H2: Shipping Guidelines for Custom Poster Paper ├─ H2: Common Uses for Custom Poster Paper ├─ H2: Artwork Requirements for Poster Paper Printing ├─ H2: How to Order Custom Poster Paper └─ H2: Frequently Asked Questions About Poster Paper ``` ## 3) PRODUCT HEADER ```html

Custom Poster Paper Printing

Create vibrant, high-quality custom poster paper perfect for promotional displays, advertising campaigns, and business presentations. Our premium poster paper delivers exceptional print quality with fast turnaround times from 1-5 business days. Choose from custom sizes up to 52" width with optional lamination for enhanced durability and professional presentation. See also [yard letter and number signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-letter-and-number-signs).

``` ## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS ```html
Size (Height × Width)
Poster Paper Material
Lamination Options
Quantity
Production Time
``` ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ```html

Custom Poster Paper Overview

Our custom poster paper provides an ideal solution for businesses and organizations needing high-quality, cost-effective promotional materials. Printed on premium 10-point paper with high-gloss finish, this poster paper delivers vibrant colors and sharp detail reproduction that makes your message stand out.

The poster paper features excellent opacity and brightness ratings, ensuring your custom designs appear crisp and professional. With maximum print widths up to 52 inches and unlimited custom sizing options, you can create everything from small promotional posters to large-format advertising displays. The high-resolution printing process captures fine details and color gradients perfectly.

Choose from multiple production timeframes ranging from 1-day priority rush to 5-day economical options. Optional lamination protection extends the life of your poster paper while adding a premium feel. Whether you need custom fridge magnets for smaller promotions or large poster displays, our printing capabilities accommodate diverse marketing needs. Upload your ready-to-print files or work with our design team to create compelling visual communications.

``` ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ```html

Poster Paper Material Specifications

Our premium poster paper utilizes 10-point (10 mil) thick paper stock specifically engineered for high-quality digital printing. This professional-grade material provides the perfect balance of affordability and visual impact for your custom poster paper projects.

The high-gloss surface finish enhances color saturation and creates vibrant, eye-catching displays that attract attention. Technical specifications include a basis weight of 235 g/m², ensuring substantial feel without excessive thickness. The paper maintains 104.5% whiteness rating and minimum 92% brightness, providing exceptional color accuracy and contrast.

With 99% opacity rating, your poster paper eliminates show-through concerns when displayed against windows or light backgrounds. The material accepts inks beautifully, producing sharp text and detailed graphics. Maximum print width capabilities extend to 52 inches, accommodating large-format poster paper designs. This durable paper stock performs excellently for indoor promotional displays, trade show graphics, and temporary advertising campaigns requiring professional presentation quality.

``` ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ```html

Poster Paper Finishing and Lamination Options

Enhance your custom poster paper with professional lamination services that extend durability and improve visual appeal. Choose from front-only lamination for basic protection or full front-and-back lamination for maximum durability and professional presentation.

Front lamination provides scratch resistance and moisture protection, making your poster paper suitable for higher-traffic environments. The clear laminate film enhances color vibrancy while protecting against fingerprints and minor abrasions. This option works perfectly for temporary displays and indoor promotional materials.

Double-sided lamination offers comprehensive protection for poster paper that requires handling or extended display periods. This premium finishing option creates a substantial, professional feel while providing maximum protection against wear, moisture, and UV exposure. The lamination process maintains print clarity while adding structural integrity. Consider laminated poster paper for trade shows, retail environments, or any application where your materials need to maintain pristine appearance throughout extended use periods.

``` ## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ```html

Production Times for Custom Poster Paper Orders

Select from flexible production timeframes designed to meet your project deadlines and budget requirements. All production times begin once artwork approval is complete and files are upload-ready.

1-Day Priority Production handles urgent poster paper orders requiring immediate turnaround. 2-Day Express provides quick delivery for time-sensitive projects. 3-Day Standard represents our most popular production option, balancing speed with value. 5-Day Saver offers economical pricing for projects with flexible deadlines.

Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day rush services may be available through customer service consultation. Production time calculations start from complete file upload or final approval if proofs are requested. Remember that total delivery time includes both production and shipping duration, so plan accordingly for your poster paper project timeline.

``` ## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ```html

Payment Options for Poster Paper Orders

All custom poster paper orders require payment before production begins, ensuring efficient processing and timely delivery. We accept major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing.

Check payments are accepted for customers preferring traditional payment methods. Personal or business checks must be received and cleared before poster paper production begins, which may extend overall project timelines.

Your credit card will not be charged until you approve your poster paper order, providing security and confidence in your purchase decision. This approval-before-charging policy ensures you have final review opportunity before production commences. For large poster paper orders or ongoing business accounts, contact customer service to discuss potential payment arrangements that streamline your ordering process while maintaining financial security.

``` ## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ```html

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Poster Paper

Your custom poster paper orders ship via UPS Ground service unless expedited shipping is selected. Standard UPS Ground provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of United States destinations, with tracking information provided once shipment begins.

Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination address. Large poster paper orders may incur additional shipping charges due to size and weight considerations. Multiple shipping speed options include Standard, Three-Day, Two-Day, and Overnight delivery.

International shipping requires customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation, accepted from USPS and UPS carriers only. Economy shipping adds 5-10 additional days depending on destination. All poster paper products are manufactured at our Minnesota facility. For specific shipping questions or special arrangements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order to ensure smooth delivery coordination.

``` ## 11) COMMON USES TAB ```html

Common Uses for Custom Poster Paper

Custom poster paper serves diverse promotional and informational needs across multiple industries and applications. The cost-effective nature and high-resolution printing capabilities make it ideal for short-term, high-impact visual communications.

Popular business applications include advertising displays, promotional campaigns, in-store advertisements, point-of-purchase displays, restaurant menus, and sales event announcements. Educational institutions utilize poster paper for presentations, event promotion, and informational displays. The material excels for trade show graphics, conference displays, and temporary signage needs.

Creative applications encompass fine art reproductions, photo displays, movie posters, portraits, and decorative graphics. Real estate professionals use poster paper for property marketing, while healthcare facilities create informational displays and wayfinding materials. Consider truck magnetic signs for mobile advertising needs. The versatility and professional appearance of custom poster paper makes it suitable for any application requiring vibrant, temporary visual communication solutions.

``` ## 12) ARTWORK TAB ```html

Artwork Requirements for Poster Paper Printing

Submit vector-based files such as .EPS with outlined fonts for optimal poster paper print quality. High-resolution .PDF and .JPG files also produce excellent results when properly prepared at 300 DPI minimum resolution.

Order proofs allow verification of artwork, pricing, and shipping details before production begins. Proof requests pause production until you provide final approval, ensuring complete satisfaction with your custom poster paper design.

For color-critical projects, utilize our Color Match Proof System to ensure precise color reproduction. Our professional graphic designers assist with file preparation and quality assessment if you're uncertain about artwork specifications. Contact customer service for artwork consultation and technical support to guarantee your poster paper project meets exact requirements and expectations.

``` ## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT ```html

How to Order Custom Poster Paper

Ordering professional poster paper is streamlined through our user-friendly online system. Select your preferred size from standard options or request custom dimensions to meet specific project requirements. Upload print-ready artwork files or work with our design team to create compelling visual communications.

Choose your production timeline based on project deadlines and budget considerations. Add lamination protection if your poster paper requires extended durability or professional presentation enhancement. Review your order details carefully, including artwork preview, specifications, and shipping information.

For businesses requiring ongoing poster paper supplies, consider establishing an account for simplified reordering and project management. Our customer service team provides support throughout the ordering process, from initial consultation through final delivery. Whether you need single poster projects or bulk orders for comprehensive campaigns, our flexible production capabilities accommodate diverse poster paper requirements. Contact us for custom car magnets and other promotional product solutions to complement your marketing efforts.

``` ## 14) FAQ ```html

Frequently Asked Questions About Poster Paper

What type of poster paper material do you use?

We use premium 10-point (10 mil) poster paper with high-gloss finish and 235 g/m² basis weight. This professional-grade material features 104.5% whiteness, 92% minimum brightness, and 99% opacity for exceptional print quality. The paper accepts digital inks beautifully, producing vibrant colors and sharp detail reproduction perfect for promotional displays and advertising applications.

How are your custom posters printed?

Custom poster paper is printed using advanced digital printing technology that delivers high-resolution, full-color results. Our printing process captures fine details, smooth color gradients, and sharp text reproduction. Maximum print width extends to 52 inches, accommodating large-format designs. The printing system ensures consistent color accuracy and professional quality across all poster paper orders, from single pieces to bulk quantities.

What are the most common poster sizes?

Popular poster paper sizes include 18"x24", 24"x36", and 36"x48" for standard promotional displays. However, we offer unlimited custom sizing options to meet specific project requirements. Sizes range from small 12"x18" promotional pieces to large-format displays up to 52" width. Our online configurator allows precise size selection, or contact customer service for custom dimensions beyond standard offerings.

Do you offer lamination for poster paper durability?

Yes, we provide professional lamination services for enhanced poster paper durability and visual appeal. Choose front-only lamination for basic protection or full front-and-back lamination for maximum durability. Lamination protects against moisture, scratches, and fingerprints while enhancing color vibrancy. This finishing option is ideal for high-traffic environments, trade shows, or extended display periods requiring maintained appearance.

What file formats do you accept for poster paper printing?

We accept vector-based files (.EPS with outlined fonts), high-resolution .PDF files, and .JPG files at 300 DPI minimum resolution. Vector files produce optimal print quality for text and graphics. If you're uncertain about file quality or preparation, our professional graphic design team provides artwork consultation and preparation services to ensure your poster paper project meets exact specifications and quality standards.

How quickly can you produce custom poster paper orders?

Production times range from 1-day priority rush to 5-day economical options. Most customers choose 3-day standard production for the best balance of speed and value. Production begins once artwork is approved and files are upload-complete. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day rush services may be available through customer service consultation.

```
